positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a sleepy sloth hanging from a bioluminescent jungle vine. The style should be detailed vector art with soft, pastel gradients and a maximalist tropical feel, reminiscent of mid-century botanical prints. High contrast outlines, vibrant jewel tones.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grayscale, photorealism
